ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set true to always open new pane even if the daily note is already opened, otherwise the plugin will try to find the existing daily note and focus on it
ast.target: 设为 true 时，即使每日笔记已打开也始终在新窗格中打开；否则插件会尝试找到现有的每日笔记并将焦点移到它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Daily notes new pane plugin adds support for colorizing today's periodic note, this functionality relies on another plugin called "Style Settings", please install and enable it so that you can adjust background colors for periodic notes
ast.target: 每日笔记新窗格插件支持为今天的周期性笔记着色，此功能依赖另一个名为“Style Settings”的插件，请安装并启用它以便调整周期性笔记的背景色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, the new line will be appended to the content of target header.
ast.target: 若启用，新行将追加到目标标题的内容中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable customize background color for daily notes in Style Settings
ast.target: 在 Style Settings 中启用每日笔记的自定义背景色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable customize background color for weekly notes in Style Settings
ast.target: 在 Style Settings 中启用每周笔记的自定义背景色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: End of day time
ast.target: 一天结束时间

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Always open new pane
ast.target: 始终打开新窗格

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Background colors
ast.target: 背景颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Append line prefix
ast.target: 追加行前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Append line target header
ast.target: 追加行目标标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Customize background color
ast.target: 自定义背景颜色

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: - HH:mm
ast.target: - HH:mm

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Easily open daily/periodic notes in new pane, and much more!
ast.target: 轻松在新窗格中打开每日/周期性笔记，还有更多功能！

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open today's daily note in new pane
ast.target: 在新窗格中打开今天的每日笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open today's daily note in new pane and append line
ast.target: 在新窗格中打开今天的日记并追加一行

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open today's weekly note in new pane
ast.target: 在新窗格中打开今天的周记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Append line
ast.target: 追加一行

ast.name: text
ast.source: Control how "Append line" commands behave, note that this functionality is only avaliable for daily notes
ast.target: 控制“追加一行”命令的行为，注意此功能仅适用于日记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Periodic notes
ast.target: 周期性笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Daily notes new pane plugin adds support for colorizing today's periodic note, this functionality relies on another plugin called "Style Settings", please install and enable it so that you can adjust background colors for periodic notes
ast.target: “日记新窗格”插件新增对今天的周期性笔记着色的支持，此功能依赖另一个名为“Style Settings”的插件，请安装并启用它，以便你可以调整周期性笔记的背景颜色
